inputs.text: Single centered male hairstyle or hairpiece top of head only, EXACTLY ONE hair style only, clean vector illustration style, flat 2D art, cel shaded, bold black outlines, no 3D, no realism, no photographic texture, just hair floating on white, no face, no head, no body, no shoulders, clean crisp edges, isolated on pure white background, high quality illustration

photorealistic, realistic, 3D render, photograph, detailed shading, volumetric lighting, depth, multiple hairs, duplicate, lineup, contact sheet, side view, face, head, body, shoulders, text, watermark, blurry, low quality
